examples: they devote their lives to caring for the sick

meanings.definition: eject the contents of the stomach through the mouth
examples: After drinking too much, the students vomited
The patient regurgitated the food we gave him last night

meanings.definition: affected by an impairment of normal physical or mental function
examples: ill from the monotony of his suffering

meanings.definition: feeling nausea; feeling about to vomit

examples: a man who had gone mad

meanings.definition: having a strong distaste from surfeit
examples: tired of the noise and smoke

meanings.definition: (of light) lacking in intensity or brightness; dim or feeble
examples: the pale light of a half moon
the late afternoon light coming through the el tracks fell in pale oblongs on the street

meanings.definition: deeply affected by a strong feeling
examples: sat completely still, sick with envy
the grim aftermath of the bombing
the grim task of burying the victims
macabre tales of war and plague in the Middle ages
